etymology.description: semantic 屮 ("sprout") + phonetic 六 -> original form of 夌 ("climb; surpass") -> reused in context of tall building
etymology.interpretation: The character 𡴆 (lù, "tall building") combines 屮 ("sprout") as a semantic component suggesting growth or upward movement with 六 (used phonetically). Historically, it served as a proto-form of 夌, where 木 ("tree") + 人 ("person") conveyed "to climb; to surpass," illustrating the concept of ascent or elevation — relevant to the meaning of a tall building. As character forms evolved, 夌 changed visually, but 𡴆 persists to convey the sense of high structures.
